MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Giao Pham's Motion to Vacate Sanctions issued on 8/18/2009 to Geraldine Armendariz, Esq., in the amount of $200.00 is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed. Proceedings not reported. (212)
